title: Reze Plush as the Totem Of Undying (Chainsaw man)
description: This Pack adds a custom made Reze Plush Into Minecraft, replacing the totem of undying with it
body:
**This Pack adds a custom made Reze Plush Into Minecraft, replacing the totem of undying with it**

 ### 

![Pack png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49ec66f52f84406fc233b2681de7f2a18022982f.png)

> **this pack Is mainly made for 1.21.10 and I will most likely update it every new update that rolls around**




ps. the actual animation for the use of the totem may be funky since I prioritized being able to put the plush in a item frame sitting up
